channel.name: FlatFileCsvBundle17
channel.description: Version: 0.9.27 Add validation to datalake Api url header for ssrf.

list.string: Content-Type, Authorization, X-TechBD-Base-FHIR-URL, X-TechBD-Tenant-ID, User-Agent, X-TechBD-REMOTE-IP, X-TechBD-Override-Request-URI, X-Correlation-ID, accept, X-TechBD-DataLake-API-URL, X-TechBD-HealthCheck, X-TechBD-Validation-Severity-Level

com.mirth.connect.plugins.javascriptstep.name: lookup_manager
Validate HTTP Request and collect headers
FHIR validation and submission

com.mirth.connect.plugins.javascriptrule.name: Http method and url checking
